item.description:
Version 1.2 — Test Release

  • Test update to verify Sparkle auto-update detection

Version 1.1

  • Footer redesigned with native menu-style items (Check for Updates, Settings, Quit)
  • Update Available indicator — menu item shows orange dot and changes label when a new version is detected
  • Refresh timestamp moved to its own row above the menu items
  • Launch at login prompt on first run
  • Sparkle auto-update support

Version 1.0 — Initial Release

  • Live token usage display (input, output, cache read/write) from Claude Code session files
  • Estimated cost with 7-day and 30-day history
  • Per-model spend breakdown
  • Daily cost bar chart (7-day and 30-day views)
  • Configurable menu bar style (text or icon)
